channel.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Oct 10th - Oct 16th, 2022
item.description:
Community plugins

  • File openerstars8 - The plugin is able to open a file given the mimeType and the file uri.

    • Capgo plugins

  • OTA Updaterstars173 - Over the air update for capacitor app.
  • Crispstars3 - Crisp chat SDK for your app.
  • Flashstars5 - Switch the Flashlight / Torch of your device.
  • Mutestars0 - Detect silent mode and mute audio.
  • Native Geocoderstars8 - Native forward and reverse geocoding.
  • Screen recorderstars3 - Record screen and save to pelicule.
  • Purchasesstars22 - Capacitor in-app purchases and subscriptions made easy with RevenueCat.
  • In app Browserstars3 - Browser In app browser with urlChangeEvent.
  • Native geocoderstars8 - Native forward and reverse geocoding.

    • Capawesome plugins

  • Background tasksstars42 - A native plugin for running background tasks.
  • Badgestars56 - Access and update the badge number of the app icon.
  • Firebase
    • Analytics - Firebase plugins for Capacitor. Supports Android, iOS and the web.
    • App - Capacitor plugin for Firebase App.
    • Auth - Handle the authentication on Native layer and propagate the token to the web view layer.
    • Performance - Capacitor plugin for Firebase Performance Monitoring.
    • Crashlytics - Capacitor plugin for Firebase Crashlytics.
  • Screen orientationstars18 - Lock/unlock the screen orientation.
  • Android dark modestars23 - Capacitor plugin to support dark mode on Android.
  • Native updatesstars80 - Capacitor plugin that assists with app updates.
  • File pickerstars32 - Capacitor plugin that allows the user to select a file.
  • Managed configuratiostars3 - Capacitor plugin to access managed configuration settings.
  • Photo editorstars6 - Capacitor plugin that allows the user to edit a photo.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Aug 22nd - Aug 28th, 2022
item.description:
Community plugins

  • Electronstars208 - Support for the Electron platform.

    • Official plugins

  • Preferences - Provides a simple key/value persistent store for lightweight data, ex Storage.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2022
item.description:
Other plugins

  • Playliststars12 - Native support for audio playlists, background support, and lock screen controls.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Jul 4th - Jul 10th, 2022
item.description:
Other plugins

  • Apple Paystars14 - Get Apple Pay payments in your app

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Apr 25th - May 1st, 2022
item.description:
Learning

Community Tutorials

  • Automatic build and release - Create your own CI/CD pipeline with GitHub actions for free, to deploy your app every time you push to main.

    • Demo apps

  • capacitor-updater-plugin-demostars0 - Simple Ionic Vue app to demonstrate the use of OTA updates.

    • Community

  • Proposalstars64 - Official repo for plugin and platform requests.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Apr 18th - Apr 24th, 2022
item.description:
Learning

Offical guides

  • How Capacitor Works - Capacitor takes a modern web app, and then packages it up to run on iOS, Android, and PWA.
  • Creating Plugins - This guide will help you get started creating a shareable Capacitor plugin which will be published on npm.
  • Creating Splash Screens and Icons - Use cordova-res to generate resource images for native projects.
  • App Deployment and Realtime Updates - Update your Capacitor app remotely through the app stores.
  • CI/CD for Capacitor Apps - Adding Mobile CI/CD to your Capacitor App development process.
  • Data Storage in Capacitor - Storing small to large amounts of data in Capacitor.
  • Security Best Practices for Capacitor - Security best practices for your Capacitor apps.
  • Using Push Notifications with Firebase - Learn how to get Firebase Cloud Messaging working on iOS and Android.
  • Saving Plugin Calls - How to save plugin calls in Capacitor.
  • Mocking Capacitor Plugins - How to create mock objects for Capacitor plugins.
  • Build Mobile Apps with Tailwind CSS, Next.js, Ionic Framework, and Capacitor - A very popular stack for building responsive web apps is Tailwind CSS and Next.js by Vercel.

    • Learning

    Community Tutorials

  • Appcenter migration - Migrating from Microsoft App Center to Capgo in just a few simple steps.
  • Update app seamlessly - Set up Capacitor-updater into your app to seamless releases update to your users.

    • Learning

    Case study

  • Native React Apps Without React Native - React Native is not a web environment, so it's not possible for teams to take their web-based React to deploy native apps, with Capacitor they can.

    • Other plugins

  • Photo librarystars1 - Get all the images from system album.

    • Tools

  • Docgenstars9 - Docs Readme Markdown and JSON Generator for Capacitor Plugins.
  • Plugin generatorstars44 - Create a new Capacitor plugin.
  • Assetsstars319 - Local Capacitor icon/splash screen resource generation tool.

    • Demo apps

  • capacitor-testappstars23 - The Capacitor TestApp is used to develop new features and verify bug fixes in Capacitor and the official plugins.
  • capacitor-plugin-demostars35 - Simple Ionic Angular app to demonstrate the use of certain Capacitor plugins.
  • capacitor-firebase-plugin-demostars7 - Simple Ionic Angular app to demonstrate the use of certain Capacitor Firebase plugins.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Apr 4th - Apr 10th, 2022
item.description:
Other plugins

  • Document Scannerstars15 - Scan documents (notes, homework, business cards, receipts, or anything with a rectangular shape).

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2022
item.description:
Other plugins

  • Dynamsoft Barcode Readerstars3 - Scan barcodes and QR codes using Dynamsoft Barcode Reader.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Mar 7th - Mar 13th, 2022
item.description:
Other plugins

  • Printstars1 - Print the WebView.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Feb 28th - Mar 6th, 2022
item.description:
Official plugins

  • Device - Exposes internal information about the device, such as the model and operating system version, along with user information such as unique IDs.
  • File system - Provides a NodeJS-like API for working with files on the device.

    • Learning

    Books

  • Building cross platform app with Capacitor - A New Approach to Cross-Platform Development.

    • Community

  • Stack Overflow - Official Stack Overflow community.
  • Discord - Official Discord community.
  • Forum - Official Forum community.
  • Reddit - Official Reddit community.

    • Learning

    Crash Courses

  • Capacitor Crash Course - Learn to use Capacitor with Ionic by Simon Grimm.

    • Learning

    Community Tutorials

  • Capacitor Tutorial - Getting Started with Capacitor.
  • Adding Icons & Splash Screens to Capacitor - Generating the Icon and Splash Screen Asset.
  • Capacitor Workflow in an Ionic Application - Cover the basic workflow when using Capacitor in an Ionic application.
  • Creating a Local Plugin - Running Custom Native iOS Code with Capacitor.
  • Publishing Capacitor Plugin on NPM - Build and publish a standalone Capacitor plugin using the Capacitor CLI.
  • Do Capacitor applications are native ? - Demonstrate why referring to Capacitor applications as "not native" is inaccurate and confusing terminology.

    • Learning

    Case study

  • Burger King - How Burger King Brought Their Design System to Mobile.
  • Capacitor vs Cordova - This guide provides an overview of Capacitor and how it stacks up against Cordova.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Jan 24th - Jan 30th, 2022
item.description:
Official plugins

  • Toast - Provides a native notification pop up for displaying important information to a user.

    • Community plugins

  • Keep awakestars72 - Prevent your screen from getting some sleep.

    • Other plugins

  • Healthkitstars23 - Retrieve data from HealthKit.
  • NativeScript
    • NativeScript Capacitorstars20 - Empower Capacitor with native APIs.
    • Augmented Realitystars115 - Add AR experiences.
  • UDPstars2 - Support both IPv6 and IPv4, multicast and broadcast.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Jan 17th - Jan 23rd, 2022
item.description:
Official plugins

  • App - Handles high-level App state and events.
  • Screen Reader - Provides access to TalkBack/VoiceOver/etc. and provides simple text-to-speech capabilities for visual accessibility.

    • Community plugins

  • Photoviewerstars30 - PhotoViewer table images with full-screen and sharing capabilities.
  • Privacy screenstars36 - Protects your app from displaying a screenshot in recents screen/App Switcher.
  • Screen brightnessstars7 - Control screen brightness on iOS and android.

    • Other plugins

  • Intentstars6 - Supports multiple broadcast receiving of intents, and sending out BroadcastIntents in Android.
  • Oauth2stars159 - Generic OAuth 2 client plugin. It let you configure the OAuth parameters yourself instead of using SDKs.
  • Video playerstars68 - Play a video full-screen on IOS, Android, Web and Electron platforms.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Jan 3rd - Jan 9th, 2022
item.description:
Other plugins

  • Data Storage SQlitestars66 - Providing a key-value permanent store for simple data of type string only to SQLite on IOS, Android and Electron platforms and to IndexedDB for the Web platform.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Dec 27th - Jan 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Other plugins

  • Zalo loginstars3 - Zalo login plugin for Capacitor.

    • Community plugins

  • App-iconstars33 - Capacitor community plugin for changing an app's icon.
  • Microsoft
    • Appcenter - AppCenter SDK.
    • Analytics - AppCenter Analytics.
    • Crashes - AppCenter Crashes.

item.title: riderx/awesome-capacitor Nov 15th - Nov 21st, 2021
item.description:
Other plugins

  • Dark modestars1 - Monitor the changes made to system's dark mode.
  • Sentrystars99 - Add Sentry error tracking and performance monitoring for Capacitor apps.
  • Screenshotstars6 - Take a screenshot of the current view.
  • App Tracking Transparencystars16 - Request user authorization to access app-related data for tracking the user or the device. iOS only.
  • Brother Printstars2 - A native Brother Print SDK implementation for iOS & Android.
  • Biometricstars84 - Use biometrics confirm device owner presence or authenticate users.
  • Email composerstars11 - Open a native E-Mail Composer within your Capacitor App.
  • Facebook Analyticsstars5 - Facebook Analytics Plugin for Capacitor.
  • File selectorstars13 - Select files form Android/iOS devices and the web.
  • Jitsistars68 - Make video calls through the free, open-sourced Jitsi video platform.
  • Lightsensorstars1 - Get the illuminance level on the device.
  • Native settingsstars18 - Open native settings screens.
  • Navigation barstars15 - Navigation Bar manipulation, hide/show.
  • Rate appstars79 - Let users rate your app using native rate app dialog for both Android and iOS.
  • Read smsstars0 - Read the user's SMS with their permission.
  • Send intentstars5 - Expose a listener in your JavaScript application for when another application sends data to your Capacitor application via the Android share menu or share sheet.
  • Stripe terminalstars21 - Stripe Terminal Plugin for Capacitor.
  • Sprigstars0 - All-in-one  product research platform.
  • Square Paymentsstars2 - Enable Square Payments for Capacitor.
  • Sumupstars1 - SumUp Mobile SDK.
  • Firebase
    • AppCheckstars5 - Allows usage of native AppCheck tokens.
    • Dynamic Linksstars9 - Firebase Dynamic Links.
    • Pushstars26 - This Plugin it used for Firebase Push Messages. It support Data.
  • Google
    • Authstars166 - Google auth plugin for Capacitor.
    • Fitstars17 - Retrieve data from Google Fit.
    • MlKit Languagestars2 - Identify the language of a string of text.
    • MlKit Visionstars11 - Detect faces in an image, identify key facial features, and get the contours of detected faces.

    • Community plugins

  • Barcode scannerstars267 - A fast and efficient QR / barcode scanner for Capacitor.
  • Admobstars121 - A native plugin for AdMob.
  • Apple sign instars103 - Capacitor Sign in with Apple.
  • Background geolocationstars95 - Receive geolocation updates even while app is backgrounded.
  • Bluetooth-lestars137 - Bluetooth Low Energy.
  • Camera previewstars133 - Camera preview.
  • Googlemapsstars131 - Plugin using native Maps API for Android and iOS.
  • Contactsstars80 - Contacts Plugin for Capacitor.
  • Date pickerstars62 - Native DateTime Picker Plugin for Capacitor Apps.
  • Facebook Loginstars65 - A native plugin for Facebook Login.
  • Flipperstars7 - A native plugin for flipper debugger.
  • Httpstars206 - A native HTTP plugin for CORS-free requests and file transfers.
  • Intercomstars37 - Enable Intercom features for Capacitor apps.
  • Mediastars37 - Enable some media features for Capacitor such as create albums, save videos, gifs and more.
  • Native audiostars55 - A native plugin for native audio engine.
  • Native marketstars16 - A native market plugin for linking to google play or app store.
  • React hooksstars203 - React Hooks for Capacitor apps.
  • Realmstars21 - A native plugin for MongoDB Realm.
  • Speech recognitionstars34 - A native plugin for speech recognition.
  • Sqlitestars215 - Native & electron SQLite databases.
  • Stripestars115 - Stripe SDK bindings for Capacitor Applications.
  • Tauristars66 - Support for the Tauri platform.
  • Text to speechstars56 - Synthesizing speech from text.
  • Twitterstars11 - Enable TwitterKit features for Capacitor.
  • Uxcamstars2 - UXCam and FullStory analytics. It uses UXCam for Android and iOS platforms and FullStory for Web/PWA.
  • Firebase
    • Analyticsstars126 - A native plugin for Firebase analytics.
    • Crashlyticsstars62 - Firebase Crashlytics.
    • Fcmstars200 - Enable Firebase Cloud Messaging features for Capacitor apps.
    • Remote configstars18 - A native plugin for Firebase remote config.

    • Official plugins

  • Action Sheet - Provides access to native Action Sheets.
  • App Launcher - Allows to check if an app can be opened and open it.
  • Browser - Provides the ability to open an in-app browser and subscribe to browser events.
  • Camera - Provides the ability to take a photo with the camera or choose an existing one from the photo album.
  • Clipboard - Enables copy and pasting to/from the system clipboard.
  • Dialog - Provides methods for triggering native dialog windows for alerts, confirmations, and input prompts.
  • Geolocation - Provides simple methods for getting and tracking the current position of the device using GPS, along with altitude, heading, and speed information if available.
  • Haptics - Provides physical feedback to the user through touch or vibration.
  • Keyboard - Provides keyboard display and visibility control, along with event tracking when the keyboard shows and hides.
  • Local Notifications - Provides a way to schedule device notifications locally (i.e. without a server sending push notifications).
  • Motion - Tracks accelerometer and device orientation (compass heading, etc.).
  • Network - Provides network and connectivity information.
  • Push Notifications - Provides access to native push notifications.
  • Share - Provides methods for sharing content in any sharing-enabled apps the user may have installed.
  • Splash Screen - Provides methods for showing or hiding a Splash image.
  • Status Bar - Provides methods for configuring the style of the Status Bar, along with showing or hiding it.
  • Text Zoom - Provides the ability to change Web View text size for visual accessibility.
